data.2555106039: The Magic of the Trees that connects the realm of Thingia with the Thumpieverse is also at the root of their shared relationship with the Monster World. That's how we end up with artifacts like this other Thumpies Totem, which tumbled across dimensions to arrive here. While prior incarnations featured other Thumpies, this one celebrates iziT, TawooO, and Anyanka.
data.3731339421: Fashioned in the likeness of the Mythical Mountain Morsel, Mount Knottshurr is made up of Bubblerite shavings held together with slobber paste. Despite its artificial origin, it seems to have taken on a life of its own. What else could you expect in the magical Monster World?
data.626962578: Through the combined efforts and resourcefulness of the Singing Monsters, one of the Ambered Things has been set loose! Flutter relates that the realm of Thingia, from which it originates, is in fact older than the Monster World, but that it was equally affected by the same events that trapped Kayna, because of the binding magic of the Trees. Whatever that means.
data.2125446444: There was some controversy as to what these floating relics should be called. One of the suggestions that was 'floated' around was Rockstars, since they positively radiate Starpower energy. However, Shugabush of Plant Island tells us that means something different where it comes from, so the Monsters went with Star Rocks instead.
data.1028232797: This superb statue celebrates the five Quad-Element Monsters that call the Natural Islands home. Nicknamed 'The Bosses,' these dynamic figures serve as role models to the other Monsters, and epitomize the cooperative power of harmony.
data.1778682419: Sweetstreamz are made of this: fluffy floating foliage, stupendous streamers of the softest blue, and gleaming stars that dangle and twinkle. Who are we to disagree?
data.2186123014: This type of tree springs into existence after a Riff has molted and the feathers interlace with local root networks. Sometimes when it sways in the breeze, it makes a faint guitar shredding sound, prompting Monsters to comment: "Ockulo's Riffed."
data.3718749171: This is what happens when pollen from outer Space germinates in Natural soil. There's speculation that the giant glowing pod is actually an egg sack, but no one is brave enough to poke it.
data.4124892470: The Swurlee Tree's great drooping palms resemble candy swirls. The nuts it drops are rumored to be delicious, but they always dissolve before they hit the ground, so no one's ever sampled them.
data.3969626323: Ahh, nothing like fine art! The Thunker depicts a Monster engaged in Thunking, the act of thinking Thunks, profound thinks that are never spoken aloud. And it even has a pecking bird in the ancient "Art Monstreau" style - divine!
data.4117777206: Don't be fooled - this Decoration won't add an extra Bed to your Island - that's the job of Castles and Hotels. Still, it's perfect for a lazy snooze.
data.3066536719: Combine a tropical parasol with some stout drums, and bingo bango bongo, you've got Bingo Bango Bongos.
data.544199177: Sure, the name 'Striking Bulbs' could refer to the fact they're pretty to look at, but those in the know insist it's a reference to their propensity for striking conga drums.
data.843784960: The Elmenco Tree grows to a short height, then part of the trunk falls away to reveal a beautiful guitar-shaped carving on the inside. It inspires dancing of great emotional intensity for all who pluck its strings.
data.924343660: The Innertuba's tread-like texture suggests it may have one time been part of a wheel, but we're quite pleased with the new form it's taken.
data.3502558213: A Smunkit, the abbreviated form of a Smunkin-drumkit, is the result of raising Smunkins to enormous size and then capitalizing on their percussive potential.
data.3984311269: Contrary to the traditional PA System, the PU System dispenses odors instead of messages. The inventors claim that there's a huge market for scent-tech... but we're a little apprehensive.
data.2946250688: Why does everyone insist on calling this Decoration a Snow Globe? It's not like the Element is called Snow, it's called Cold. We're very insistent on this point.
data.2009904913: Givutawai, givutawai, givutawai now! This Tree is often the brunt of bogus giveaways and suspicious scams... e.g. "You're the one millionth visitor to this Island! Claim prize now!" But all it really wants is to share its tiny trinkets, which are a bit more offbeat than their bright packaging might suggest.
data.154072124: Plant Island is a serene, sleepy paradise. Lie back and let the whisper of nature fill your ears. Breathe deep, and savor the intoxicating fragrance of flowers in bloom. Things change a little when Monsters arrive: Plant Island gets noisy. You won't be doing much napping then!
data.2411366034: Under twinkling stars in a crystalline sky, swept by freezing winds, Cold Island is a bleak and lonely destination. No worries; the arrival of Monsters will create a lively winter festival!
data.1155945783: What could be more fun than a party in the clouds? Air Island is ready for a celebration. When Monsters arrive, there'll be dancing, singing, and all manner of shenanigans!
data.1508074895: In the unfathomable depths of the living ocean, Water Island is the embodiment of tranquility. Encrusted with vibrant coral reefs and host to mysterious tentacled beasts, it exists unperturbed. That is, until the Monsters arrive: their joyful tunes are sure to make a splash!
data.2462037546: At first glance, Earth Island seems almost inhospitable. The air is humid and a bit stifling, and care must be taken not to step in a puddle of molten magma. Upon closer inspection, however, one can plainly see that it's the perfect venue for belting out Monster tunes that really put the rock in rocking!
data.699563521: It's every Singing Monster's dream to one day vacation on the glorious Gold Island. Only the most experienced (and well-fed) among them ever get the opportunity to join in its resounding anthem, which celebrates Monsters and music of all kinds!
data.2470828699: If Ethereal Island seems otherworldly to you, you're spot on. Located in a pocket dimension of the multiverse, it is home to Monsters unlike any that have been seen or heard before. Oozing with mysterious substances and orbited by objects of ominous origin, you won't be able to resist the sublime wonder of its song!
data.2532863495:
In a remarkable confluence of Legendary energies, the dimensional fabric bridging our reality and the Monster realm has revealed an all new island! Supervised by the Shugabush, a host of other Monsters have been invited to join together with the band and create a musical experience like never before!

Love Or Money (Monster Remix)
Kristian Bush, Jeff Cohen, Matt Thiessen
© 2013 Songs Of The Architect (BMI), As You Wish Music (BMI), Songs Music Publishing, LLC o/b/o Songs MP (BMI), Stylishly Flyfishing Publishing (BMI)
Remixed with permission by Architect Music Collective, LLC
data.3966502095: Looks like this alternate version of Plant Island has gone a bit topsy-turvy, almost as if it's been flipped upside down. Monsters would feel comfortable approaching the ancient remains of what looks like a Teleporter structure, if it weren't for the spasmodic sputters suggesting it might still be functional. The leading theory is that the plasma orbs and Ethereal sinews covering its surface reveal a close relationship between the Elements of Plant and Plasma. After all, stranger things have happened.
data.1369860097: Ever look up into a wintry sky and wonder why it's that funny purply color? The residents of Mirror Cold Island get to experience this every day. Another popular experience for Monsters here is to try and dislodge the fallen rocks obstructing the mouth to a wondrous cave. Many think that the 'swirl' glyph plentifully bestrewn on the rocks has something to do with a long forgotten technology used to travel to remote corners of the multiverse.
data.2352001412: Even though the brain-like tissue that collects around the platforms of Mirror Air Island may unsettle some, it makes up for it by magically attracting more rainbows to its corner of the sky. The Colossal's goggles appear to be made from a rare variant of Skylite, a mineral long thought depleted in the Monster World. What marvels might be glimpsed through their azure lenses? We may never know.
data.4047747036: The living ocean has truly come alive around the Mirror Water Island. Crystals resembling those that make up the local Ethereal are seen poking up in the spaces between coral, and a mysterious relic not unlike the Tub Fountain's grimacing figure seems to emanate feelings of hope and possibility. The Monsters wish they knew more about how all this came about, but for now they'll have to be content to enjoy its splendor.
data.752184921: It's generally advisable to keep a safe distance from molten magma, which is why the Monsters are stumped that anyone could have gotten close enough to carve a mini-volcano out of Earth Island's crust. The noxious green fumes that encircle Mirror Earth Island may well be a consequence of the volcano's construction and tampering with the natural order - but it's equally possible that they represent an apparent harmony between Earth and Poison.
data.3560075304: Composer Island exists on the Seam, an invisible partition between the Monster World and the human world. This is where you can unleash your pure musical creativity! The Monsters have been aching to learn some new songs for years, and with the guiding presence of the half-awake Colossal Vawldee, there is no limit to the potential that can be achieved. The possibilities are endless!!!...Alright, settle down. It's easy to lose one's composure when describing Composer Island.
data.3223410073: At one point in history, few could have foreseen the formation of Tribal Island. After all, the Colossals and their island hosts were fated to go their separate ways, never to rejoin... were they not? The advent of Tribal Island may represent the fulfilment of a prophecy from primitive times, in which greater bonds than ever before will be forged between caretakers of the Monster realm, and harmony will once more be achieved. Strike up the Tribal song and all will be revealed in time...
data.1304457716: Coursing with the Supernatural element of Electricity, Wublin Island's true origin is unknown. Thanks to clues recovered from its static surface, the going theory is that this realm was designed and brought to life by a mysterious entity who wanted some playmates. Its solution? To create those playmates from its own imagination, and Zap them into being using the power of Electricity. And thus, the Wublins were born. A shocking idea, to say the least.
data.1444987918: Just when you thought you knew everything there was to know about the Monster World, something unexpected drops out of the sky... literally. Hurtling through the atmosphere and crash-landing atop the head of a heretofore unknown Colossal, features of this archaic setting seem to echo those of Starhenge, a mystical structure from ancient times. It was traditionally the lofty perch of the Celestials, luminous beings that shared a connection with the Monster World and the cosmic energies beyond; but... those were just stories... right?
data.68900851: A long time ago, when the Continent broke apart, the guiding magic of the Colossals rescued the 5 Elemental Lands and transformed them into the Natural Islands we know today. However, it was long believed that the first and most powerful Element, Fire, had been lost in the cataclysm... Fire Haven unquestionably proves otherwise! Species that had not been seen or heard since the Dawn of Fire were simply hiding out in the living core of the Monster World. Now, they welcome their old companions to their sanctuary to swap stories, learn new songs, and revel in their reunion. Long live Fire!
data.2372361768: Following the rediscovery of Fire, the Monsters sought to create a special place on the surface of the Monster World for even more Fire Elementals to dwell. After searching far and wide for remnants of the Outer Islands (unsuccessfully - they seem to have disappeared), the Monsters decided that if they couldn't find a suitable home, they'd create one! Crafted from blown glass and heated by fathomless geysers beneath the surface, it's only a Glowl's glide away from a neighboring tropical atoll.
data.1178307981: While the Monsters were waiting for reinforcements to explore more of Fire Frontier, a previously unknown group of beings suddenly appeared on the island's surface. Introducing themselves as Psychic Elementals, they explained that the island itself was actually an enormous entity known as Cruv'laapht. Records indicated that the Titan had moved in to fill the void left by a cosmic island from ancient times that had one day simply blipped out of time and space. Content to harmonize with their new Psychic pals, word was relayed back to the other Monsters to divert their efforts to the continued exploration of the Monster World. Team Psychic for the win!
data.3232759587: If there's a place where wishes come true, Faerie Island is that place. In the twinkling twilight and swirling mists stands the Faesodd Titan, outlandish and unlovely, dissembled by a mask of exquisite flowers and gleaming stigmata. Here, shrouded by the unusually billowy clouds, Faesodd and the native Faerie Elementals have dwelled, unperturbed by the outside world... until a group of Monsters is invited to join in the Island's jubilant song!
data.200486022: Head deep - deeper beneath the surface of the Monster World than you ever thought possible - and then head even deeper. That's where you'll find the chthonic Bone Island, sitting atop the Necrull Titan's head. Lustrous geodes and bright, subterranean vegetation are juxtaposed with decrepit fossils and ornate skulls, suggesting that at one point this was the site of an ancient underground pool that supported life. Now, the visiting delegation of Fire and Natural Monsters are coaxing the native Bone Elementals out of hiding to breathe new life into this ghoulish locale and turn it into a favorite 'haunt!'
data.4205157971: There's a special feeling one gets when beholding Light Island for the first time - some have described it as 'deLightful' or 'enLightening' - but we think that 'Light-headed' works best! Framed by the wondrous phenomenon of the Aurora Monstralis, this Magical Island's Titan, Phosphora, does not reside in one place - instead, it migrates around the Monster World! It is also suspected to hail from another dimension, one where the Magical Element of Light shares characteristics with other luminous residents. At rest, the Light Elementals are among the shyest and drabbest in the Monster World, but once they start singing, they and the visiting Natural and Fire Monsters harmonize to create an eye-popping, 'Light-hearted' chorale!
data.758402123: After vanishing into the Prism Gate during the Dawn of Fire, the long-lost Outer Islands have finally been found - and they've crash landed in the Mirror timeline! The meteoric arrival of Space Island's central moon, Staggeron-IV, has upgraded the alternate Cruv'laapht's eye socket from cavity to crater. The Psychic Titan's spaceborne critters must also keep watch for cosmic debris, lest a rogue asteroid poke them in the, well, eye. But with millions of stellar bodies twinkling in the galaxies above, it's safe to say that Mirror Psychic Island is the perfect astral abode.
data.2432573573: After vanishing into the Prism Gate during the Dawn of Fire, the long-lost Outer Islands have finally been found - and they've crash landed in the Mirror timeline! The intertwining of Cloud Island with the Faerie Titan, Faesodd, was much gentler than the other Mirror Magical Islands, amounting to more of a soft envelopment than an earth-shattering collision. The paper birds have emerged from the Prism Gate untorn and are quite content to share their not-so-floating birdhouse and gleaming sun-lamp with Monsters and wispy critters alike.
data.1298725120: After vanishing into the Prism Gate during the Dawn of Fire, the long-lost Outer Islands have finally been found - and they've crash landed in the Mirror timeline! The crystalline growths that encrusted Cave Island wasted no time overtaking the cavernous chasms of the Bone Titan, Necrull. Every nook, cranny and crevice has been speared with a stalagmite or skewered by stalactites. With so many glimmering gems reflecting what little light can reach them, this dank dwelling has been illuminated to levels never observed before! Unfortunately, this has shone a light upon the growing fungal infection in Necrull's ear - but it's under control, they promise.
data.1779969077: After vanishing into the Prism Gate during the Dawn of Fire, the long-lost Outer Islands have finally been found - and they've crash landed in the Mirror timeline! Party Island's breakneck descent from the Prism Gate toward the Mirrored Phosphora's vulnerable pate was a nail-biting spectacle that nearly ended in disaster. Unbeknownst to all, a giant, buoyant Glubpole egg embedded deep within the island cushioned the impact, bursting into a yolky explosion. But that wasn't the end for this young party animal! The Glubpole's essence has seeped into the soil of Light Island, growing up alongside its newfound friend Phosphora and enjoying the boisterous bashes the Monsters host atop its head - bouncy castles included!
data.838422006:
Few are brave enough to explore the dark nooks and crannies of the pocket dimension... but if you are, there you'll find the majestic Magical Sanctum. Standing in the center of a grove of alien trees stretching into the sky is a mysterious Titan whose name was originally lost to history, but which was later revealed to be Enchantler*. It aspired to transcend and become a Colossal, but when it proved impossible, it fled and found a way to the pocket dimension. There, atop its pate and formidable antlers coursing with Monstromantic energies, Enchantler founded a sacred place for Magical Monsters to truly feel at home and perform a solemn hymnody to a place all their own in the Monster World.

*This name was the winner of our "A Titan by Any Other Name" Community Contest held after Magical Sanctum's discovery, chosen by the Monster-Handlers and canonized for all time thereafter!
data.3950562424: Had it not been for seismic serendipity unearthing it from its hiding place, the existence of the Colossingum might have remained a secret forever. Estimated to date back to the waning years of the Dawn of Fire, the provenance of its magnificent architecture is regarded to be the first-recorded instance of a Colossal spirit imbuing its lifeforce into an island. Evidence suggests that this was the site of rigorous musical training and friendly choral competition. Today, Monsters are establishing a restored presence on the Colossingum, to resume their musical empowerment and to discover the secrets held in its ancient brickwork.
data.3963802886: Have you ever wondered what the Seasonals get up to outside of their Events... let's face it, who hasn't?! It's true that Monsters like Yool and Schmoochle are mostly migratory, but when they're looking to kick back and relax, they head to the Seasonal Shanty! A wooden structure stuffed to the rafters with seasonal trimmings, and floating serenely along the surface of the living ocean, it's only the Seasonals who know how to find it. The Shanty's one permanent resident, the jovial Jam Boree, safely monitors the comings and goings of its fellow Monsters and gets super excited around Anniversary Month, when all Seasonals drop by for a visit!
data.1792452520: On the same higher plane of existence that houses Gold Island resides the reunited halves of the Fire Colossal's spirit in the form of Amber Island; and while the concept of reunion figures prominently in both islands, how it is achieved differs greatly. Amber Island was conceived as a 'seed vault,' manifesting the potential for all of the original Fire Monsters from the era of the Dawn of Fire as specialized Vessels. Everything from the sap-covered Green Trees that dot its landscape, to the powerful energies of the Relics encased inside its Amber Castle, connect it back to foundational elements of the Monster World, and indeed to the very essence of the multiverse's mighty but mercurial World Tree. Once brought into being, the Fire Monsters here sing a song of elation tempered with a wistfulness for simpler times.
data.2710205453: In the Monster World, the moon is a central piece of imagery for the concept of fantastical travel and far-fetched aspirations. As such, it's no surprise that Mythical Island, the reification of the desire to assemble with one's kin, is so lunar-focused. The Lunapparatus, the site's most prominent landmark, is crafted from Hummatite, an 'impossible' substance that cannot occur naturally in the main dimension. With sufficient concentration and nourishment, Mythical Monsters can embark on a one-way journey here via the arcane art of dreamcraft. Here, they greet the personification (or rather, the monsterfication) of the power of dreams itself, the clever Cataliszt, who is essential in manifesting their wildest dreams in reality as fanciful 'Dreamythicals.'
data.3163505845: So this is how the other half lives... literally! For all of recorded Monster history, the Ethereal class has been confined to Single- and Double-Elementals... until the establishment of the Workshop. Located inside Ethereal Island and doubling as the 'brain' of the Colossal Zarroë, it's actually superimposed on the abandoned ruins of another entity's laboratory. Here, Zarroë has achieved the impossible and brought to life Triple-Element Ethereals (and beyond) using the unpredictably powerful Meebs and strange new Structures of its own invention. The Colossal's goal? To create a symphony of synthetic sounds worthy of the name Workshop!
data.2010355472: There's a being who's sure all that glitters is gold... and it's buying a stairway to heaven. Even though some facets of it appear familiar, the Magical Nexus doesn't actually belong to the Monster World proper; it hails from Beyond. The floating island is situated at the cosmic 'crossroads' of the wanderings of the Stair Shaper, an enigmatic entity that hitchhikes across galaxies searching for intelligent life with which to commune. Over the span of its interstellar travels, the Stair Shaper has recruited many like-minded beings of titanic size to its cause, and once it learned the history of the Colossals, dispatched them to integrate into the Monster World. Now, the Magical Monsters born of these unions can use Transposition to travel to the Nexus and 'meet their maker' for the very first time. At times serene, at others rousing, the Nexus's song represents the culmination of a lifetime's hopes and dreams.
data.4048020926: Zarroë had long coveted the limitless potential of the Mirror timeline, a reality seemingly unaffected by the confinements of Ethereal Elemental instability. It was, after all, the source of the Attuned Meebs which powered so many of their creations on the Workshop. But... after the formation of the Mirror Magical Islands, the thin membrane separating the pocket dimension from the Mirror timeline was left weak and porous. It took but one powerful blow from the Ethereal Colossal to break into the Mirror timeline and begin construction on its latest brainchild: the Ethereal Islets! Representing a great primordial ooze that traces its origins back to the dawn of the universe, it is only fitting that Plasma Islet is the first product of this project to materialize. Here, the next phase of Zarroë's experimentation is underway: Dish-Harmonization of Ethereal hybrids and the actualization of the Primordials. The mercurial Plasma that stretches across the Islet reacts differently depending on how Monsters tread upon it: running quickly creates a pleasantly bouncy surface, while slowly ambling across may result in sticky soles. Only by standing perfectly still can you fully experience the indescribable texture of the first Ethereal Element.
data.974861851: Continuing their Ethereal Islets project in the mirror timeline, the Colossal Zarroë had to undertake special preparations for the creation of Mech Islet. As of the end of the Dawn of Fire, the Monster World forfeited its reputation as a realm known for advanced technology, and even at its height, only the ancient Starhenge came close to the level of sophistication and wizardry that would now be required for this Islet. Above and beyond the 'Mech'-nical challenges of the construction task, perhaps the even more daunting one was keeping its development a secret from the feisty Mech Quad Vhenshun, determined as it was to depart the confines of the Workshop and embark upon adventures in the broader world. In a special refuge in the Workshop, Zarroë toiled and tinkered, designing the advanced systems and machinery that would bring Mech Islet to life. The final product speaks for itself: gigantic gears and joints power the enormous hand, impossibly-complex holograms create virtual constructs before your very eyes, and of course, the patented Dish-Harmonizer Structure is ready to invite all manner of Mech-Element Monsters to perform a raucous industrial strain!
data.3410855118: Ethereal Elements are just as ancient as their Natural equivalents, but took a proverbial 'back seat' when the time came to select building blocks for the prehistoric Continent. Here in the Mirror timeline, the Colossal Zarroë has capitalized on the chance to rewrite the rules and give the Ethereal Elements their due. Each Islet is manifested in a separate way; in the case of Shadow Islet, Zarroë began by breaking through the membrane but stopped short of punching all the way through to the Mirror timeline. Making a 'pit stop', it allowed dark matter from the Rift, the world between worlds to coalesce upon its hand projection. When enough material had accumulated, the hand was ready to emerge at its final destination near Mirror Cold Island. However, instead of simply transforming into the Islet itself, Zarroë's hand cast a shadow upon the snowstorms below, and the dark matter falling from it condensed into the shifting miasma that we now recognize as Shadow's domain. Here, Pentumbra's originality is put to the test, as it enthusiastically participates in the Dish-Harmonization process to produce the family of Shadow Elementals and the Cold Primordial, all of which will perform the Islet's captivantingly eerie nocturne!
data.1136491: Bringing new worlds into being is not as simple as it sounds - and it already sounds pretty complicated! The raw imaginative power of Colossals must be complemented by practical knowledge in fields like physics and chemistry... and Crystal is the perfect, well, crystallization of that concept. Understanding the geological processes of how minerals form or the refraction of light through a prism to produce colors prove valuable indeed, especially when one is undertaking a project at the scale of the Ethereal Islets. Zarroë had to chalk up on their crystallography, especially as it pertains to the transmutation of matter across timelines and dimensions. It's no accident, for example, that temporal manipulation is achieved through Diamonds, or that the Prism Gate of the ancient Monster World relied on the crystalline Prisments to operate. This information, along with other insights, were integrated into the inception of Crystal Islet - inspiring! The cha-rhys-matic Rhysmuth presides over faceted fields and vitreous vistas, all glittering like a jewel itself within the embrace of the Mirror living ocean.
data.1245044402: Come one, come all! Well, all Paironormals, that is. The qualifying quartet of four Core Elementals - Control, Hoax, Ruin, and rounded out by Depths - can Transpose themselves to the Beyond by tapping into a special spacetime-folding ability that comes naturally to one of them (and was taught to the remaining three). Their carnivalistic destination seems oddly foreign to the Monster World, and were it not for the residents' inclination to the musical, the "island" could easily be passed off as belonging to a totally separate dimension of the multiverse. Weaving pathways meander this way and that, and a panoply of funfair curios float in orbit around the central concretion. It goes without saying that Paironormal Carnival's defining attribute is its quantum musical modality. Bright and cheerful while in Major mode, with Monsters resonating with Starpower, the Carnival undergoes a startling transformation to be gloomy and sinister in Minor mode, with Wildcard generation reflecting the cosmic chaos. The Paironormal population follows suit, of course, swapping to their Minor forms and unsettling all those who venture here. But it's fun to get scared... isn't it? Prolonged exposure to the thin atmosphere of the Carnival tends to result in contracting an unusual malady called Space Circus Fever.
data.4036034051: There's no distance that a Monster won't travel for a chance to visit the Clubbox, the Monster World's premier destination for the most sublime songs they'll ever hear. The 'Lyriqal Legendary' Club manager Autotuna lent its expertise to renovate, innovate, and elevate the Clubbox experience, and now works closely with the resident DJ Epic to craft exciting and unexpected Acts to headline concerts. These Acts represent exciting opportunities for Monsters of various Classes and backgrounds to collaborate like they never could before! Modeled after the Wubbox's "go-inside-and-there's-a-party-happening" vibe (and with Supernatural architecture to match!), it never stays in one place for too long. Having embarked on multiple Monster World tours in the past, the Clubbox can now voyage under its own power and 'Boosts' the local Island economy wherever it visits. If you can get your hands on coveted Clubbox Tickets, you'll get the chance to work closely with Autotuna and DJ Epic to build Acts, Hype up the performance and earn spectacular rewards!
data.3691674367:
Monsters are the things that go bump in the night (though they're usually napping), so it's no surprise that many embrace the spooktacular stylings of Spooktacle! You don't have to be out of your gourd to find glee in a Smunk-o-Lantern's glow, or bliss in the bubbles of a cauldron. For Monsters in the Spooktacle spirit, there ain't no rest for the wicked! This Plant Island Skin will showcase the spooktacular décor of Spooktacle year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.1520306257:
Lettuce bask in the bounty of the harvest with this lush Skin for Plant Island, featuring the Harvherd Titan! With so many succulent fruits and veggies growing free, we simply carrot believe any Monster wouldn't turnip to enjoy a healthy snack. It's so radishing, it makes our hearts skip a beet!...Okay, we get it, puns are sort of corny.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles, and unlocks the ability to buy unique Obstacle Decorations.
data.2061750136:
We all know that one Monster that sings Yay carols every month of the year. For those special Monsters imbued with unwavering Festival of Yay cheer, this makeover is the ultimate gift! The icy chill of Cold Island becomes infinitely more heartwarming when it's adorned with glimmering baubles and stockings hung by the Castle with care. This Cold Island Skin will display the merry décor of the Festival of Yay year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.4235705814:
The scalp of the towering Sweti is a daunting climb, but once you arrive, you'll find the comforting setting of this Cold Island Skin! Swetis are unflappable Titans that are tended to by monastic critters and that don't bat a glowing eye when Monsters scale their flowing locks. Every Sweti settlement keeps the same unfortunate secret to preserve the beast's dignity: that "snow" is really dandruff.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles, and unlocks the ability to buy unique Obstacle Decorations.
data.3937262571:
Who says Monsters can only revel in romance once a year? You don't need a special some-Monster to strew roses at your feet, or a reservation for two at Chez Monstrueux to set heart-shaped balloons afloat. All you need is love! This Air Island Skin will flaunt the romantic décor of the Season of Love year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.1815718213:
What is a Gigacheep, you may ask? Look below the twiggy surface of this Air Island Skin and find out! The Gigacheep is an ancient airborne behemoth seen once in a Monster's lifetime - if it's lucky. Once a mature Gigacheep's fledglings fly the coop, it becomes an empty nester, and seeks to fill its Island-sized nests with new Monster friends.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles, and unlocks the ability to buy unique Obstacle Decorations.
data.3871015809:
Have your Eggs gone missing and/or been painted beyond recognition? Well, flip that frown sunny side up, because Eggs-Travaganza is centered around the spirit of mischief and fun! With dozens of painted Eggs hiding in every nook and cranny, the Monsters will be picking eggshells out of their Ice Cream for years to come. This Water Island Skin will show off the eggstravagant décor of Eggs-Travaganza year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.1613721903:
Swim from the middle of the living ocean toward the shore, and you just might discover the fabled Glubber Lagoon! This Water Island Skin reveals the greatest sea creature known to Monsterkind: the gargantuan Glubber, a leviathan-like being that values nothing more than the revered treasures hidden within its bivalve shells. Legend says that, for the right Monster, these clams will open to reveal the most glorious treasure of all: the Gift of Glub.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles, and unlocks the ability to buy unique Obstacle Decorations.
data.1564900212:
Being a Monster can be hard work. The singing! The strumming! The snacking! When it's time for some serious R&R, the beaches of SummerSong are there. Long nights lounging by tiki torchlight, sweltering days spent building sandcastles and surfing the Earth Island waters - SummerSong makes Monsters feel fine! This Earth Island Skin will rock the tropical décor of SummerSong year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.3687975386:
Discover ancient artifacts harkening back to Monster antiquity in this Earth Island Skin! Hahoo is a great stone scribe who possesses the singular ability to engrave records of Monster history into the brickwork of its very body - though tragically, these engravings are in a language known only to Hahoo itself. Etched into the surface of this living library are retellings of every major event in the Monster World, stretching back to the Dawn of Fire and beyond.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles, and unlocks the ability to buy unique Obstacle Decorations.
data.1194679865:
Celebrated in isolation for generations, it's time to welcome extended friends and family and make it a feast to remember! In a stroke of good luck, the waxy soil of Fire Haven is ideal for growing a bountiful harvest's worth of delectable delicacies. During Feast-Ember, Monsters are invited to stuff their faces with as many Treats as they can fit, surrounded by charming autumnal features like Scareglowls, leaves of red and gold, and crops aplenty. Better gobble up while the going is "gourd!” This Fire Haven Skin will showcase the heartwarming décor of Feast-Ember year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.3557731100:
Huzzah! Every intrepid explorer worth their pith helmet needs a trusty basecamp from which to embark on exciting excursions into the unknown, and you won't find any better than this! The exquisite blown glass of Fire Oasis has been reworked into gigantic tools, gadgets and trinkets that acts as tributes to exploration and the scientific method. The light of the early evening sunset refracts beautifully through these glass forms, and reminds us of the special significance this island holds in the history of broadening the horizons of the Monster World. This Fire Oasis Skin will showcase the scholarly décor of Perplexplore year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.3662380813:
Color and light! For a brief window of time following the estival solstice, the charged particles of the Aurora Monstralis transform it into a special gateway that bathes Light Island in multi-colored effulgence. The powers of the portal extend to the landscape as well, metamorphosizing Phosphora's familiar shapes into stunning lenses and Glowbe-shaped sculptures that radiate with the power of light. To capture the magical feeling these phenomena evoke, Monsters devise clever fireworks that light up the night sky and resonate with the pride of belonging. This Light Island Skin will effuse the kaleidoscopic décor of SkyPainting year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.75279934:
Did you know that Monsters only use 10% of their brains? Actually, that's totally wrong - and if you pick up a book, you too will learn something new during the celebration of MindBoggle! Recognizing the joys of reading and the challenges of brain teasers and puzzles, it was originally founded by notable Boo'qwurm literary figure Rylek Du'Brom, author of the epitomic collection of essays and short stories 'The Lost Habits.' The Titan Cruv'laapht itself is understood to be a devout adherent to the cause, manifesting bookcases in the shape of eldritch cousins and populating them with enough books and Bib'leos to extend your reading list unto eternity! This Psychic Island Skin will spawn the librarial décor of MindBoggle year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.3344704372:
When the dense clouds around Faerie Island dissipate and some of the clear blue sky shines through, the magic of Cloverspell can begin! Fantastical rainbow bridges bear bedecked embellishments to this Magical hotspot, and you can feel your luck improving with each passing second. Gigantic metal shoes fashioned for ridiculous fantasy creatures and pots of enchanted coins add to the party atmosphere, and even the Faesodd Titan is sporting a green, clover-filled version of its famous mask! This Faerie Island Skin will manifest the charming décor of Cloverspell year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.1496397984:
The enlivening scent of cempasúchil wafting in the air, the sudden appearance of sugar skulls and calacas... it must be time for the Beat Hereafter! Even though this traditional observance helps to connect the living with their long-departed ancestors, it is anything but solemn - quite the opposite in fact! The noise and bustle of the festivities resonate with the profound power of the 'heartbeat of forever'. The Necrull Titan also observes this holiday by dressing up, itself a contradictory being of simultaneous 'aliveness' and 'deadness,' and perfectly suited to hosting the event. This Bone Island Skin will showcase the lively décor of the Beat Hereafter year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.2184607354:
Rewind the clock and bear witness to the formation of one of the oldest islands in the Monster World! This 'snapshot' depicts a moment frozen in time from the early days of the pocket dimension, as the experimental sandbox was molded by its eccentric Colossal caretaker into a full-fledged island. Strewn with Bubblerite sculptures and dotted with blueprinted landmarks still being drawn from the imagination, it represents a rare glimpse into the Life-Formula creative process undertaken by the Colossals. This Ethereal Island Skin will portray the formative décor of Life-Formula year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.2633096381:
Ready your resolutions - it's time to ring in the new year with the renewal of the Crescendo Moon! As the Monster World moon signifies one's sincerest hopes and deepest desires, the Enchantler Titan undergoes a striking transformation to honor its own dream of becoming a Colossal. This time of year is marked by a period of efflorescence - winter cherries and peonies miraculously take root on the normally fallow landscape. As paper lanterns sway overhead and the glow of the Titan's antlers is reflected in the beautiful cloisonné pin, you can't help but feel that this year is going to be YOUR year! This Magical Sanctum Skin will showcase the resplendent décor of Crescendo Moon year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.3392847098: Happy birthday, My Singing Monsters! To mark the yearly milestone of restored contact between the Monster and human Worlds, the month of September ushers in a joyous celebration filled with welcome visits from limited-time Monsters, and much-anticipated special offers and promotions. Gold Island plays host to raucous party games, poignant reunions, and features all the confetti and balloons a birthday bash could dream of! Offered exclusively on a trial basis each September, this Gold Island Skin showcases the celebratory décor of Anniversary Month.
data.624175349:
Great trees from little seeds grow, and that's certainly true of the Echoes of Eco! The plant life trapped in hardened sap has burst forth from its sheath, transforming the island into an auspicious arboretum filled with exotic tree species from another dimension of the multiverse. It's the culmination of a years-long conservation effort called Project SEED, undertaken by the Amber Colossal, to make sure that 'echoes' of the unique flora of the Greatfruit Grove are forever preserved. This Amber Island Skin will showcase the dendritic décor of the Echoes of Eco year-round.

NOTE: This Island Skin changes the appearance of Obstacles.
data.301033766: There's a whole universe out there past the edges of the Monster World, from Anglow's home planet to the point of origin of Stair Shaper. Magical Nexus and Paironormal Carnival both reside in the Beyond.
data.740543407: The waters of the living ocean that surround the Seasonal Shanty are appropriately referred to as the Shanty Sea. It's next to impossible to navigate unless you happen to be a Seasonal who knows the way.
data.2800200920: The dreamspace is a metaphysical reality devised by Dream Crafter so that Mythical Island may exist there. It's neither real nor unreal, but if we had to place it somewhere, it'd be on the Monster World moon.
data.3140532877: Jammerland is a tropical atoll near Fire Oasis where a castaway population of Toe Jammers established their own society long ago. Its terrain is diverse and its recreational activities very splashy.
data.177807883: The Seam runs along the outer equator of the Monster World. Numerous islands that share an especially strong connection with the human world can be found along this invisible path.
data.2758338137: Dense clouds form in this area of the Monster World, a vestige of even stronger weather patterns from Monster antiquity. They both protect and isolate Faerie Island.
data.3119277915: The living core, the Monster World's most prominent volcano, only recently emerged above the surface of the living ocean, having spent countless years submerged and presumed lost after the end of the Dawn of Fire.
data.564399273: A series of labyrinthine tunnels and passageways criss-cross the subterranean reaches of the Monster World. They are especially concentrated in the region around Fire Haven.
data.3346093735: The higher plane is another dimension of reality that allows Monsters to exist in two places at once, and has historically also been used as a 'seed-vault' for the precious Element of Fire. Both Gold Island and Amber Island reside in this superliminal state of being.
data.643021023: Intense tempests of lightning and thunder encircle Wublin Island; the area is positively coursing with the Supernatural Element of Electricity.
data.2323728732: The majority of the Monster World is covered by a single massive body of water known as the living ocean. Most Islands are situated above the surface, but Water Island is uniquely positioned beneath the tides.
data.42724735: The deepest section of the living ocean is called the Monstriana Trench, where unusual deep-sea creatures dwell. Wublin Island is accessible via a crack in the sea floor at the bottom of the trench.
data.4264684213: The pocket dimension actually predates the Monster World, and served as an experimental staging ground for the Colossals during the earliest days of their acts of creation. Currently, Ethereal Island, the Workshop inside it, and Magical Sanctum are contained therein.
data.1432761579: It wouldn't be a proper map without some fancy Monstrous calligraphy that spells out 'The World' and depictions of fearsome creatures from parts unknown.
data.3713759003: The Aurora Monstralis is a magical phenomenon that lights up the night sky. The Titan Phosphora follows the Aurora around, causing Light Island to never be in a fixed position.
data.2384866683: The Mirror timeline is a parallel timeline where events diverged from those of the main reality of the Monster World. Alternate versions of Natural and Magical Islands can be found here, as well as the Ethereal Islets project of the Colossal Zarroë. Defying comprehension, the Minor mode of Paironormal Carnival is also accessible here.
data.3839594885: All's Fair in Love and Song

data.1438513461:
Welcome to Ethereal Island!

This mysterious Island is the ultimate destination for the Single-Element Ethereals you breed on the Natural Islands, as well as the home of a new family of Ethereal Hybrids! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.3606367173:
Welcome to Magical Sanctum!

This sacred Island is the ultimate destination for the Single-Element Magicals you breed on the Magical Islands, as well as the home of a new family of Magical Hybrids! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.162797075:
Welcome to Seasonal Shanty!

This makeshift Island is the home away from home for Seasonal Monsters from across the Monster World, and is bustling with activity every year around Anniversary Month. Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.315840891:
Welcome to Amber Island!

This ambrosial Island was a safeguard for the Element of Fire dating back to ancient times, and is where you can use the spark of life to revitalize special Vessels containing the essences of all Fire Monsters. Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.569253073:
Welcome to Mythical Island!

This oneiric Island is the ultimate destination for the Mythicals you breed on the Natural and Fire Islands, as well as the home of the Cataliszt and exotic Dreamythicals! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.1780597722:
Welcome to Ethereal Workshop!

This secret laboratory is hidden inside Ethereal Island and uses revolutionary Structures to harness the powers of Attunement and Synthesis and bring previously-impossible Ethereal hybrids to life! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.1584593288:
Welcome to Magical Nexus!

This alien site is the domain of the Stair Shaper, an enigmatic being who invites Monsters from the Magical Islands to join together in song via Transposition! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.
data.2734501166:
Welcome to Plasma Islet!

The first of Zarroë's Ethereal Islets, the Colossal mastermind continues their grand project through the use of the experimental Dish-Harmonizer Structure, which turns the Quad-Element Ethereal Monster into other Plasma Elementals and an exclusive Primordial! Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.

Welcome to Shugabush Island!

Only a few select Monsters can be summoned to join with the Shugabush to create more members of the Legendary Shugafam. Visit the Help menu to learn how to populate this Island.

data.3950600386:
Welcome to Composer Island!

This is your chance to harness the musical powers of the monsters and create your own compositions! Know what you're doing? Great! Don't know what you're doing? Also great. Music has rules, but those rules are meant to be broken. Mess around, try new things, tap every button once, and see what happens!
data.3508440662: Only Composer Islands can be renamed!
data.3463059337: Welcome to Composer Island! On this Island, you take up the mantle of Monster-Handler and teach the Monsters new songs! Let's show you how.
data.3037914873: Welcome to the Book of Monsters! This is your one-stop shop to help track your Singing Monster collection. When you collect a new species, its silhouette will transform to a portrait of that Monster! Tap a silhouette to learn more about how to add that Monster to your collection. Tap 'Islands' to switch between Islands. Good luck, and Happy Monstering!
data.1849468193: Here's where the magic happens. Tap anywhere on the staff to add a note, represented by the Monster's egg, and tap again to remove. Swipe left and right to navigate along the track and keep adding to the Monster's musical part. Tap 'Play' to listen to your composition, and 'Save' to make it official. Tap 'Help' to learn more and become a true Composer!
data.221033100: Learn the Monster-Handler tricks of the trade to take your composition to the next level.
data.3748519941: Tap 'Play' to listen back what you've composed so far.
data.2387410954: Tap the navigational buttons to go to the beginning, end or middle of your composition.
data.1664972492: Tap the Monster's portrait to switch between Monsters' parts.
data.2526835150: Tap 'Save' to protect your hard work!
data.3282779105: Tap 'Clear' to erase what you've done and start anew!
data.3366571738: Tap 'Save Part' to be able to use your work across different Monsters.
data.4059337233: Tap 'Show/Hide' to view multiple Monsters' parts on the muscial staff at once.
data.1257450054: Toggle Advanced Mode to gain access to even greater musical customization.
data.1143447148: Advanced Mode, hm? How adventurous of you! Either you already know what you're doing, or your curiosity is insatiable. Either way, that's great! Advanced Mode gives you greater control over your compositions than before, with the ability to change tempo, sharps and flats, time signatures and key signatures. If you didn't recognize some or any of the terms listed above, no worries - experiment and you'll get the hang of it!

data.1671364836: Thank you for downloading the latest update! This 'tune up' contains improvements, fixes and optimizations - and a special Costume too!
data.952416356: We experienced some unexpected outages, but the issue has now been resolved! Here's a little something to help get you back on track!
data.2085732643: The Monster-Handlers have made a balancing 'tune up' to strive for a fair and equal experience for all players. To express our gratitude, please enjoy the attached gifts!
data.88419725: Us Monster-Handlers were so impressed with what you had created, we thought it should be rewarded! So here's a little something for you to enjoy! Happy Monstering!
data.2782436108: September 4th is My Singing Monsters' birthday! Thanks for 14 years of breeding, feeding, and singing with the Monsters! Happy Monstering!
data.2422813104: Here's a little gift for you! What's the occasion, you might ask? Anniversary Month, of course!
data.3572385673: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a safe and happy Spooktacle! There's no better time to be a Monster... and to celebrate, here's a gift for you!
data.120164982: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a joyous and lively Day of the Dead! In the spirit of the Beat Hereafter, here's a gift for you!
data.3571567582: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we wish you peace and prosperity with your loved ones! In the spirit of Feast-Ember, here's a gift for you!
data.2416220503: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a Yippee Yay and a safe and happy holiday! Keep the magic of music and family close to your heart this season... and to celebrate, here's a gift for you!
data.230990665: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a happy Lunar New Year! May the power of the Crescendo Moon bless you with good luck and positivity - it's not in a red envelope, but here's a gift anyway!
data.832892527: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a happy Season of Love! Today isn't about presents or doodads, it's about spending time with the ones you love... but to celebrate, here's a gift anyway!
data.1810444448: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a rollicking Cloverspell! Don't be afraid to be the magical life of the party... and to celebrate, here's a gift for you!
data.987763751: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we wish you a Hoppy Eggs-Travaganza! Remember that a little mischief now and then doesn't hurt. In the spirit of sharing, here's a gift for you!
data.1794208525: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we wish you green and growing Echoes of Eco! Respecting the natural world is important... and to recognize the occasion, here's a gift for you!
data.2328353992: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a scientifically satisfying Perplexplore! Learn something new today... and in the spirit of the season, here's a gift for you!
data.1917025169: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, have a fulfilling Life-Formula! Anyone can inspire a world of creativity... customize yours with the help of a gift!
data.756507373: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we wish you a loud and proud SkyPainting! Everyone belongs in the Monster World... and to celebrate, here's a gift for you!
data.3644751024: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we hope you're having a safe and happy summer season! Kick back and relax - you've earned it. That's how Hoola rolls... and in the spirit of sharing, here's a gift for you!
data.4017820147: On behalf of all of the Monster-Handlers, we wish you a brain-bending MindBoggle! Outside of a Stogg, a book is a Monster's best friend... to celebrate, here's a gift for you!
